items.question: Who performs treatments at Aura?
items.answer: All treatments are personally performed by Dipna Patel, RN — the founder and sole practitioner. You will always work with the same expert who knows your skin and history.

items.question: Is laser hair reduction painful?
items.answer: Aura uses the Motus AZ+ laser, which is designed to minimize discomfort. Most clients describe the sensation as mild warmth. The technology prioritizes comfort without sacrificing effectiveness.

items.question: How many sessions will I need for laser hair reduction?
items.answer: Most clients need 6 to 12 sessions for optimal results, depending on hair color, skin tone, hormone levels, and the area being treated. Many clients notice smoother, slower-growing hair after just 1 to 3 sessions.

items.question: Do you treat all skin tones?
items.answer: Yes. The Motus AZ+ laser platform is safe and effective for all skin tones, including darker complexions that were previously difficult to treat with older laser technology.

items.question: How do I prepare for laser hair reduction?
items.answer: Shave the area 24 hours before your appointment. Do not wax, tweeze, or thread for 4 weeks prior. Avoid sun exposure and tanning before treatment.

items.question: What is the Moveo GLO treatment?
items.answer: Moveo GLO combines three laser treatments in one session: pigmentation reduction, skin revitalization, and vascular treatment. It is ideal for clients looking for comprehensive improvement with fewer visits.

items.question: Is the Skinwave Aqua Facial right for my skin type?
items.answer: Yes. The Skinwave is suitable for all skin types including oily, dry, acne-prone, and sensitive skin. It cleanses, exfoliates, and hydrates in a single comfortable session.
